PreToolCall.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.env\.local|\.env\.production|\.env\.vercel|\.env$'; then echo 'BLOCK: env file contains secrets' && exit 1; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'StandardsLibrary\.js|RegulatoryData\.js|AuditMethodology\.js|CrossReferenceIndex\.js|FRSEncyclopaedia\.js|IFRSEncyclopaedia\.js|ChartOfAccounts\.js|TestingProgrammes\.js'; then echo 'CAUTION: Large regulatory data file (>100KB). Verify ISA/FRS accuracy before editing.' && exit 1; fi

PostToolCall.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'vitest run|npm run test|npm run build'; then echo 'Build/test completed'; fi
